raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current role assessment","name":"What's feeling solid in your role right now, and what's stretching you?","description":"Identify areas of strength and current challenges in their role.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation dynamics","name":"How are you deciding what to delegate and what to keep on your plate?","description":"Explore their decision-making process around delegation.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Vision for growth","name":"What aspects of design leadership are you eager to develop further?","description":"Identify specific interests in expanding leadership skills.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Cross-team collaboration","name":"What do you see as your role in bridging design with product and engineering?","description":"Explore their perspective on collaboration and influence across teams.","purpose":"competency","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Skills development gap","name":"Which skills do you feel need the most attention to reach your next career milestone?","description":"Identify skills that need development for career progression.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Recognition and achievements","name":"What recent achievements in your design leadership do you think deserve more recognition?","description":"Discuss recent successes and how they are valued within the team.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Managerial support","name":"What support do you need from me to better manage your workload and priorities?","description":"Identify ways the manager can help manage workload and priorities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Trade-offs and focus","name":"What would you need to stop doing to focus more on your growth areas?","description":"Encourage prioritization and identifying trade-offs for growth.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next steps commitment","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Identify a specific action to focus on before the next meeting.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
